candidates will be designated as Trainee
job_location: (WFH or Company premises ?) The Atrium, Quark City, Sector 74, Industrial Area, Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar, Punjab 160055

package_salary.ppo_ctc: For BCA & MCA : · Stipend during 6 months of Internship : 15 K per month · Salary after 6 months of Internship : CTC 3 - 5 LPA (Only Rs. 200 deduction) For B.Tech : · Stipend during 6 months of Internship : 18 K per month · Salary after 6 months of Internship : CTC 3.5 – 5 LPA (Only Rs. 200 deduction)
package_salary.bond: Following a successful internship, candidates transitioning to full-time positions are expected to commit to a 12-month tenure. This requirement is in acknowledgment of the company's investment in their professional development.
